usage_profiles.label: YouTube Enthusiast
usage_profiles.recommendation: Consider YouTube Unlimited add-on (Rs.499/month) to save data. Lower quality to 720p to reduce usage by 50%.
tips: Download videos on WiFi for offline viewing
Use YouTube Premium for background play

usage_profiles.label: Online Gamer
usage_profiles.recommendation: Need minimum 50 Mbps package. Gaming itself uses less data but game downloads are huge. Schedule updates during off-peak.
tips: Schedule game updates for off-peak hours (12AM-8AM)
Use wired ethernet for gaming - lower ping

usage_profiles.label: Work From Home Professional
usage_profiles.recommendation: 30-50 Mbps package is ideal. Prioritize stable connection. Consider wired connection for important meetings.
tips: Use ethernet cable for video calls

usage_profiles.label: Social Media User
usage_profiles.recommendation: Basic 10-30 Mbps package is sufficient. TikTok and Instagram use significant data due to video content.
tips: Enable data saver mode in TikTok and Instagram

usage_profiles.label: Family Household
usage_profiles.recommendation: 100 Mbps package recommended for 4+ family members. Multiple simultaneous users need higher bandwidth.
tips: Set up QoS on router to prioritize important activities
